zh.Croft, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾卡芙特
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Abigail Church於1365年出生在英國藍卡爾。她於1389年與William Symonds結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1420年享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Church
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name mostly found in southern and midland England, for someone who lived near a church, or possibly an occupational name for someone who worked at a church, such as a verger or sexton, from Middle English chirche ‘church’. The word comes from Old English cyrice, ultimately from medieval Greek kyrikon, for earlier kyriakōn (dōma) ‘(house) of the Lord’, from kyrios ‘lord’. Compare Kirk .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Kirch  .

variants.name: Kirk
meanings: Scottish, English, and Danish: from Middle English, Danish kirk ‘church’ (Old Norse kirkja), a topographic name for someone who lived near a church. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century or earlier.

variants.name: Kern
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German kerne ‘kernel, seed, pip’; Middle Dutch kern(e), keerne; German Kern or Yiddish kern ‘grain’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a farmer, or a nickname for a physically small person. As a Jewish surname, it is mainly artificial.
English (southeastern): metonymic occupational name for a maker or user of milk churns, from Middle English kern, kirn, kurn, a side-form of chern ‘churn’. Compare Church .
Slovenian: nickname for a stunted person, from an old spelling of krn ‘stunted’.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Abigail Church was born in 1365, in Lancashire, England. She married William Symonds in 1389. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1420, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Abigail Church est née en 1365, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé William Symonds en 1389. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1420, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Abigail Church wurde 1365 in Lancashire, England geboren. Sie hat 1389 William Symonds geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Abigail Church è nata il nel 1365 nel Lancashire, England. Lei sposato William Symonds nel 1389. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1420, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Abigail Churchは1365年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた。1389年にWilliam Symondsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1420年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Abigail Church(은)는 1365년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1389년 William Symonds(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Abigail Church nasceu em 1365, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com William Symonds em 1389. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1420, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Abigail Church родилась в 1365 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Symonds в 1389 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1420 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Abigail Church nació en 1365, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Se casó con William Symonds en 1389. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1420, a la edad de 55 años.
